dates.summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a new voice model designed for real-time, interruption-tolerant conversation with attentive listening and interference suppression, alongside a Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview release on Arena. Google expanded its AI-powered Google Finance experience to Europe, extending generative financial search and analysis into a major new market. On the research side, the paper "Tool Calling is Linearly Readable and Steerable in Language Models" reports that tool selection signals are linearly decodable across 12 instruction-tuned models from 270M to 27B parameters, pointing to a potentially practical control layer for agent reliability.
